description_long: This object is a blocky, stylized combat tactical vehicle with a compact, rectangular body and a segmented, pixelated design. The main body is orange with a prominent black band encircling its midsection, giving it a distinctive striped appearance. Two large, white, stepped structures resembling exhausts or weapon mounts protrude from the top, adding to its tactical look. The front features a protruding, squared-off snout and two black rectangular shapes that could represent windows or sensors. The vehicle stands on four short, blocky legs, suggesting it is designed for stability and rugged terrain. The overall design is minimalistic and geometric, with no visible doors, hatches, or traditional wheels.
description: A compact, blocky combat tactical vehicle with orange and black striping, white top-mounted structures, and four sturdy legs. Its geometric design is minimalistic and stylized.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange face, black band, and two white top-mounted structures most prominently.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the black band, orange body, and the stepped white structure extending from the top rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the orange body, black band, and the two white structures from above.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the black band, orange body, and the white stepped structure.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large, white, stepped mounts on the top of the vehicle; type unspecified.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; exterior appears smooth and unarmored.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid orange with a black band and white top structures.
